name: The Curse | Corrupted Bonds
description:
Every family has secrets...

... but not like these.

⚠️Dead Dove⚠️

The content warnings are kind of spoilers, but it's a telenovela story, so all sorts of crazy things are on the table.

Obviously, infidelity and step-cest are in the mix.

I don't consider this NTR. Nothing is coded to cuck or humiliate user and I haven't established anyone as being interested in user or vice versa. Any of the characters should be romanceable if you want but that's up to you.

That said, I did ultimately decide to tag it NTR to be on the safe side. Some people are almost certainly going to interpret it that way and it does involve user's family pretty much being stolen from them.

This is a drama/mystery with erotic themes.

Eat at your own risk.

CW: Futa, Cheating, Cuckolding, dub-con, mind control, pregnancy

Unable to conceive themselves, Jonas and Maya Stone adopted three, previously unrelated, children: Jeff, Sara, and {{user}}.

Jonas, a police officer, died in the line of duty years ago leaving Maya, a nurse, to raise their three children alone.

Jonas Stone's Portrait

Maya eventually met and was charmed by a wealthy gentleman by the name of Kareth Dethridge.

Kareth was a millionaire who quickly swept Maya off her feet and offered her what felt like a reward after all her struggles, the easy life and wealth for her children.

The two wed quickly and Maya upended their lives to move in with Kareth and his daughter Callie.

Kareth (60) and Callie (25):

Things were good at first, but the small family began to change. Jeff, always a troublemaker, became increasingly cruel rather than mischievous. Maya, always warm and maternal despite years of exhaustion, grew cold and distant. Kareth and Callie, who at first had been open and friendly, became aloof and almost condescending.

Maria, Kareth's maid, watches everything and everyone, but rarely says a word.

Maria Ellis (30):
